claims.text: 1. A method for reducing the risk of an adverse drug interaction in a patient suffering from depression, comprising (i) determining if the patient is also suffering from insomnia and is being treated ...

1. A method for reducing the risk of an adverse drug interaction in a patient suffering from depression, comprising (i) determining if the patient is also suffering from insomnia and is being treated ...

1. A method for reducing the risk of an adverse drug interaction in a patient suffering from depression, comprising (i) determining if the patient is also suffering from insomnia and is being treated ...

1. A method for reducing the risk of an adverse drug interaction in a patient suffering from depression, comprising (i) determining if the patient is also suffering from insomnia and is being treated ...
(ii) prescribing or administering to the patient a therapeutically effective amount of quazepam to treat the insomnia if and only if the patient is not being treated with bupropion.

use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR TREATING INSOMNIA WHILE REDUCING THE RISK OF AN ADVERSE DRUG INTERACTION

indications.text:
DORAL is indicated for the treatment of insomnia characterized by difficulty in falling asleep, frequent nocturnal awakenings, and/or
early morning awakenings. The effectiveness of DORAL has been established in placebo-controlled clinical studies of 5 nights
duration in acute and chronic insomnia. T...
